evidence.label: EU eIDAS Trust List (Qualified Trust Service Provider)

organization.description: MULTICERT - Serviços de Certificação Electrónica is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Portugal, providing digital trust services via pki.multicert.com.
